# Short Query Benchmark Fixture
#
# Single- and two-character queries that deliberately exercise the
# _finalize_short_query_results multi-batch annotation loop bounded by
# _SHORT_QUERY_MAX_ANNOTATION_BATCHES (= 3 at the time of writing).
#
# This fixture is NOT consumed by the default
# tests/test_benchmark_search_latency.py CI smoke test because each short
# query takes tens of seconds against the full LSJ lexicon and would push the
# CLI run past the existing 300s subprocess timeout. Use this file only for
# manual short-query performance characterization:
#
#   uv run python tools/benchmark_search_latency.py \
#       --queries tests/fixtures/search_benchmark_short_queries.txt \
#       --warmup-rounds 0 --measurement-rounds 1
#
# Short-query path correctness is enforced by
# tests/test_search_short_query.py (in particular
# test_short_query_finalization_bounded_to_annotation_window). This file
# adds the latency / batch-iteration view; it is not a regression gate.

# 1-char queries
α
ω

# 2-char queries
λα
κα
ντ
οσ
pa
